channel.title: SevenAtSevenPolitics
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from SevenAtSevenPolitics, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Big Oil embraces global exploration again as Chevron returns to Libya
item.description: American Big Oil is returning to countries in the Middle East, Africa, and beyond to find new sources of oil and gas.

item.title: Census Numbers Paint a Misleading Picture of Poverty in America
item.description: Non-cash benefits bring many Americans above the poverty line â and our poverty statistics should reflect that.

item.title: Trump makes good on troop pullout promise, vows return if Democrat city crime worsens
item.description: Thousands of National Guard troops were withdrawn from Los Angeles, Chicago and Portland after Trump's administration deployed them under Title 10 aut...

item.title: Americaâs national debt borrowing binge means interest payments will rocket to $2 trillion a year by 2036, CBO says
item.description: Annual interest payments will double to $2.14 trillion by 2036, nearly double the yearly budget for spending on defense.

item.title: Conservatives Canât Beat Democrats Until They Defeat The RINOs In Their Own Party First
item.description: Until conservatives root out the rot within their own party, the D.C. status quo will continue to remain the same.

item.title: The Doorbell Camera Surveillance State Is Not Just About Finding Fido And Grandma
item.description: The mass surveillance state is quite literally on your doorstep in the form of a big-tech owned doorbell camera.

item.title: Why Election Crimes Are Rarely Prosecuted In Georgia
item.description: The structural dysfunction of state offices in enforcing Georgia's election law has too often led to flagrant disregard of those laws.

item.title: Bishops Call On Notre Dame To Rescind Pro-Abortion Professorâs Appointment To Leadership
item.description: The appointment is merely the latest attack on the Catholic identity of Notre Dame in recent years.

item.title: Republican lawmaker's early retirement rumors send shockwaves through House GOP
item.description: House Republican Rep. Neal Dunn of Florida has announced his plan to retire at the end of this congressional term, but rumors of an early departure ar...

item.title: The UAEâBinanceâTrump Affair: A Comprehensive Timeline
item.description: How did Trumpâs net worth skyrocket during his second term? The final installment in this series pieces together key events.

item.title: Trump Religious Liberty Commission boots member after contentious antisemitism hearing
item.description: President Donald Trump's Religious Liberty Commission removed Catholic activist after controversial antisemitism hearing.

item.title: Gov. Moore boasts funding initiatives in State of the State address, slams Trump
item.description: Maryland Gov. Wes Moore touted what he called his administrative success and shook his finger at "Washington's cruelty" during his fourth State of the...

item.title: Mike Tyson in the 'fight of my life' as he partners with Trump admin in health initiative to tackle obesity
item.description: Mike Tyson joins HHS Secretary Robert F. Kennedy Jr. to fight obesity after losing his sister when she was 25 to a heart attack. The boxer said he wan...

item.title: Federal Regulators Finally Get Out of the Climate Business
item.description: Consumers and businesses will be freer when the EPA no longer treats greenhouse gas emissions as a public danger.

item.title: Hardline conservatives double down to save the SAVE Act
item.description: The SAVE America Act would mandate identification for voting, in-person citizenship proof for registration and removal of non-citizens from voter roll...

item.title: At 22, Olympic skier Eileen Gu is worth over $20 million âsheâs juggling brand deals and sports with school. And she urges Gen Z not to wait until theyâre âolderâ to start.
item.description: 22-year-old Olympian Eileen Gu is the fourth-highest-paid woman in sports, ahead of stars like Naomi Osaka and Caitlin Clark. Yet sheâs still a studen...

item.title: Three unidentified names in Epstein files raise questions about hidden connections
item.description: Three names newly unredacted from the Jeffrey Epstein files remain shrouded in mystery, with no clear public record connecting them to the convicted s...

item.title: Carrie Prejean Boller removed from Religious Liberty Commission
item.description: Texas Lt. Gov. Dan Patrick removed Carrie Prejean Boller from the White House Religious Liberty Commission after setting off a contentious hearing thi...

item.title: âThe fiscal trajectory is not sustainableâ: CBO warns about the highest debt in U.S. history as Trump adds $1.4 trillion to 10-year deficit
item.description: The national debt is set to surpass the historic high of 106% of GDP (which it reached in 1946) by 2030, according to the CBO.

item.title: Trumpâs Ruinous, Failed Attempt to Indict Congressional Democrats
item.description: An impeachment attempt just got more likely.

item.title: The Gen Z job nightmare is so bad that even billionaires are worried their kids wonât be able to keep a job, says wealth advisor to the 0.1%
item.description: Itâs a âvery real concernâ for the ultrawealthy that their children arenât prepared for the future, wealth adviser Tom Thiegs told Fortune.

item.title: U.S. deficit rises as Trump tax cuts, immigration crackdown sap revenue
item.description: President Trump's tariffs have given Uncle Sam a boost, but the government will still run a nearly $2 trillion deficit this year, the Congressional Bu...

item.title: Politico: Judges Use âWorkaroundsâ To âBypassâ Pro-Trump Rulings On Immigration
item.description: The judges highlighted by Politico are not outliers, in fact, they are emblematic of an activist judiciary that defies constitutional limits.

item.title: Civil War Breaks Out at Human Rights Watch
item.description: The turmoil presents an opportunity for accountability.

item.title: 'Fight of my life': Mike Tyson knocks out processed food in MAHA push for healthy diet
item.description: Iconic boxer Mike Tyson said Wednesday he is fully committed to helping President Trump and his team implement dietary guidelines that will help Ameri...

item.title: AI Is Reshaping Bank Risk
item.description: AI is exposing the limits of legacy bank controls, making governance quality critical to resilience and investor confidence. The post AI Is Reshaping ...

item.title: What Makes an Ideal Leveraged Buyout Candidate?
item.description: In competitive PE markets, successful LBOs depend on durable business models, recurring cash flows, defensible market positions, and disciplined targe...

item.title: Rethinking Household Asset Allocation Under Capital Constraints
item.description: Leveraged ETFs arenât about more risk, theyâre about using less capital to achieve a desired risk profile in household portfolios. The post Rethinking...

item.title: Stockholmâs Capital Markets Success: More Than Meatballs
item.description: Stockholmâs capital-market success reflects more than IPOs and PE activity. It offers a case study in how culture, institutions, and incentives shape ...

item.title: Where AI Ends and Investment Judgment Begins
item.description: AIâs growing capabilities challenge traditional investment skill, shifting competitive advantage toward governance, process, and judgment. The post Wh...
